findings.title: Cisco IMC and SSM On-Prem Dual Critical — Unauthenticated Admin Bypass and Root RCE
findings.affected_technology: Cisco Integrated Management Controller (IMC) and Smart Software Manager On-Prem
findings.summary: Cisco disclosed CVE-2026-20093 (IMC auth bypass) and CVE-2026-20160 (SSM root RCE), both CVSS 9.8, allowing unauthenticated attackers to take full administrative control of server management infrastructure with no workaround available.

findings.title: FortiClientEMS Unauthenticated RCE — CVE-2026-35616
findings.summary: Fortinet disclosed an improper access control vulnerability in FortiClientEMS allowing unauthenticated remote code execution via crafted requests, with two public PoC exploits appearing on GitHub within hours of disclosure.

findings.title: TA416 Resumes European Government Espionage with PlugX via OAuth Abuse
findings.affected_technology: European government and diplomatic organizations (EU, NATO)
findings.summary: China-aligned APT TA416 has resumed targeting EU and NATO diplomatic entities using OAuth redirects through Microsoft Entra ID and cloud storage for PlugX backdoor delivery via DLL side-loading.

findings.title: Signal Android Intent Redirection Enables Decrypted Attachment Exfiltration
findings.summary: GitHub Security Lab disclosed GHSL-2026-102, an intent redirection vulnerability in Signal for Android allowing a malicious app on the same device to exfiltrate decrypted message attachments, bypassing end-to-end encryption at the device level.

findings.title: React2Shell (CVE-2025-55182) — UAT-10608 Mass Credential Harvesting, 766+ Hosts Compromised
findings.summary: Cisco Talos attributes mass exploitation of React2Shell to UAT-10608, confirming 766+ compromised hosts with automated NEXUS Listener framework stealing database credentials, SSH keys, AWS secrets, and Kubernetes tokens at industrial scale.

findings.title: TrueConf CVE-2026-3502 — Added to CISA KEV, Chinese APT Exploitation Confirmed
findings.summary: CISA added CVE-2026-3502 to KEV on April 2 with April 16 deadline after SecurityWeek confirmed Chinese APT exploitation against Asian government organizations for reconnaissance and payload deployment.

noted.summary: CVSS 10.0 vulnerability disclosed April 2; limited enterprise exposure but critical for Juju-based cloud orchestration environments.
Unauthenticated RCE via ZWSP .htaccess bypass; Metasploit module released April 3.
Two stored XSS vulnerabilities disclosed by GitHub Security Lab enabling potential account takeover.
Whitespace padding bypass vulnerability disclosed on Full Disclosure mailing list April 2.
Broken access control vulnerability disclosed by SEC Consult on Full Disclosure April 2.
